content:
Pisces June 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Shift and transition — home and roots get reorganized; community opens at month-end
Key Dates New Moon Jun 14 (Gemini, 4th house) / Full Moon Jun 29 (Capricorn, 11th house) / Jupiter enters Leo Jun 29
Love Venus in your 3rd house — words of affection, sibling love, neighborhood connection
Career 11th house Full Moon + Jupiter in your 6th — community and routine expand together
Crystal of the Month Moonstone
Lucky Colors Sea green, lavender, pearl white
Lucky Number 7
Affirmation I let the roots and the circle grow together; one feeds the other.

This Month’s Energy

Pisces, June 2026 balances roots and circles. The Super New Moon in Gemini on June 14 falls in your 4th house of home, family, and roots — a fresh start in your living situation. Chiron enters Taurus on June 19 (your 3rd house), beginning an 8-year healing chapter around communication, siblings, and short trips. The Capricorn Full Moon on June 29 lights up your 11th house of friendship, community, and future vision, and the same day Jupiter enters Leo (your 6th house of work and routine), opening a 12-month chapter of work expansion. Mercury turning retrograde in Cancer (your 5th house) on June 29 means creative and romantic conversations get reworked. June’s job is to settle the home base early, then open to the community and the new work chapter.

Key Dates for Pisces in June 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Pisces Do / Avoid
Jun 14 Super New Moon in Gemini 4th house — fresh start in home, family, living situation, inner foundation Do: sign the lease, move, clear the home, mend the family tie, set a home ritual
Avoid: signing housing contracts June 27–July 23 (Mercury Rx)
Jun 19 Chiron enters Taurus 3rd house — 8-year healing of communication-wounds, sibling-wounds, learning-wounds; how you speak and are spoken to Do: name the sibling truth, work with a speech coach or therapist on your voice, write the letter
Avoid: swallowing your voice to keep peace
Jun 29 Capricorn Full Moon + Jupiter enters Leo + Mercury Rx 11th house friendship climax + 12-month work expansion opens; creative/romantic conversations scramble Do: declare the year’s community and work intentions, document creative agreements
Avoid: launching major creative projects during Mercury Rx
Jun 4 Venus enters Taurus 3rd house Venus — love of words, sibling affection, neighborhood romance, beautiful communication Do: write the love letter, mend the sibling tie, walk your neighborhood with a friend
Avoid: hiding your affection in your head
Jun 9 Mars enters Virgo 7th house Mars — partnership energy spikes; significant relationships demand action Do: name the relationship truth, make the commitment, have the hard conversation
Avoid: conflict that escalates unnecessarily
Jun 21 Sun enters Cancer 5th house season — creativity, romance, play, children through July Do: make the art, go on the date, schedule the play
Avoid: postponing joy for some future “stable time”

Career & Money

The Capricorn Full Moon on June 29 falls in your 11th house of friendship, community, and future vision. For Pisces, this is a climax around a community project, a friendship circle, or a long-held future-vision. Many Pisceans will see a group effort or future-dream reach a turning point.

Then on June 29, Jupiter enters Leo, your 6th house of work, routine, and health, beginning a 12-month chapter of work expansion. New jobs, new routines, new health commitments, new daily practices — all favored across the next year. The catch: Mercury turns retrograde in Cancer (your 5th house) the same day, scrambling creative project communications. Close pending creative deals before June 27; avoid launching a major new offer between June 29 and July 23 without review. Mars entering Virgo (your 7th house) from June 9 brings partnership energy to career — a business partner may demand action. Crystals for wealth can support the work; the practical move is patient documentation.

Love & Relationships

Venus enters Taurus on June 4 (your 3rd house of communication). For Pisces, this is a month where words of affection become the love language — write the love letter, say what you mean, mend the sibling tie. Mars in Virgo (your 7th house of partnership) from June 9 brings assertive energy to one significant relationship; for couples, this is the moment to name the truth, and for singles, an important person may enter through assertive pursuit.

The 4th house New Moon on June 14 supports home as romance — beautify your space, share a home with a partner, allow family into your love life. Mercury Rx in your 5th house of romance from June 29 brings old creative or romantic conversations back for review. Crystals for love can support the work; the deeper practice is letting words of affection be spoken, not just felt.

Health & Wellness

Jupiter entering Leo on June 29 begins a 12-month chapter in your 6th house of work, routine, and health — the year your body and daily practices can expand and improve. Lock in the routine, begin the body practice, commit to the daily wellness habit. Jupiter magnifies whatever you set in motion now.

The 4th house New Moon on June 14 also reminds you that home is wellness — your living space deeply affects your nervous system. If your home doesn’t support your well-being, this is the moment to make a change. Moonstone, your crystal of the month, holds your inner weather steady through the year’s transition. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Moonstone

Why Moonstone fits Pisces this month. You are Jupiter- and Neptune-ruled, and June asks for both inner foundation work (4th house New Moon) and emotional clarity through transitions (Chiron in your 3rd, Mercury Rx in your 5th). Moonstone, traditionally tied to lunar cycles, intuition, and emotional tides, is the stone that holds your inner weather steady through all of it. It is, simply, your stone.

How to use it during June 2026. Wear Moonstone as a pendant over your heart from June 14 (the 4th-house New Moon) through July. Place it on your nightstand through the Mercury retrograde that begins June 29 — it supports dream-supported inner work.

Best date to use it: June 14, the Super New Moon in your 4th house — Moonstone over your heart for 10 minutes of breathing, naming the home and family intention you want to set.

Read more: Moonstone Meaning and Best Crystals for Pisces.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Pisces — June 2026

When: June 14, the Super New Moon in Gemini (your 4th house).
Crystal: Moonstone.
Intention: Set the home foundation that supports the year’s expansion.

  1. Cleanse Moonstone under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of June 14.
  2. Set the intention on the 4th house theme: write down one home or family change you’ll make in the next 30 days — a move, a clear, a mended tie, a ritual.
  3. Act by making the home change before Jupiter enters Leo on June 29. Moonstone in your pocket during the change.
  4. Reflect at the Capricorn Full Moon on June 29: what opened in your foundation, and what community or work does it support next? Carry Moonstone during the review.

Shop Pisces Crystals for June 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Pisces crystal guide for stones connected with intuition, compassion, dreams, and emotional healing — including the Moonstone that holds you steady through the year’s transitions. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Pisces June 2026

Is June 2026 a good month for Pisces?

Yes — the first three weeks favor home, family, and roots work. Then Jupiter enters your 6th house on June 29, beginning your best work-and-routine year in over a decade. Mercury Rx in your 5th house that day is the only catch.

How will the Gemini New Moon on June 14 affect Pisces?

It falls in your 4th house of home, family, and roots — a fresh start in your living situation. Sign the lease, move, clear the home, mend the family tie. Just avoid signing housing contracts during Mercury Rx (June 27–July 23).

What does Jupiter entering Leo mean for Pisces work life?

Jupiter in your 6th house begins a 12-month chapter of work, routine, and health expansion. New jobs, new daily practices, new health commitments — all favored across the next year.

What is the best crystal for Pisces in June 2026?

Moonstone — your traditional stone, perfectly matched to a 4th-house New Moon and a year of transitions. Wear it from June 14 through July. See the full Pisces crystal guide →

How does Chiron entering Taurus affect Pisces communication?

Chiron in your 3rd house begins an 8-year healing of communication-wounds, sibling-wounds, and learning-wounds. How you speak and are spoken to gets reworked — your voice is allowed to take up space.

Should Pisces launch a creative project in late June 2026?

Not advised. Mercury turns retrograde in your 5th house of creativity on June 29. Any creative project launched June 27–July 23 will likely need rework. Close what’s already in motion; delay new launches.
